title: mclient and JDBC error on `SELECT * from t1 limit X;` from bigger tables (100GB, 750GB)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE client_ns.sales_data (sale_id INTEGER NOT NULL, product_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL, quantity_sold INTEGER NOT NULL, total_amount DOUBLE NOT NULL, customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL, discount DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO client_ns.sales_data (sale_id, product_name, sale_date, quantity_sold, total_amount, customer_id, discount) VALUES (1, 'Product A', '2023-01-01', 10, 100.0, 101, NULL);
INSERT INTO client_ns.sales_data (sale_id, product_name, sale_date, quantity_sold, total_amount, customer_id, discount) VALUES (2, 'Product B', '2023-01-02', 5, 50.0, 102, 5.0);
SELECT * FROM client_ns.sales_data WHERE quantity_sold > 0 LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: SELECT * from larger tables with limit clause
